title: WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: WEATHERIZATION ANNEX WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists in weatherizing homes. The following assessments can be performed to identify energy-related problems in the home: heating system safety checks, diagnostic combustion tests, insulation in attics and walls, and duct sealing. 1981 Fescue Street SE Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Income 200% or below the federal poverty level Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 738-0958 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 738-0958 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete the application. Program uses a waitlist. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID for all household adults, Social Security numbers, Proof of income, and current utility bill AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties Services: Weatherization Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WEATHERIZATION ANNEX
